subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's approach to uncharge-charging compressed objects, suggesting it may not be efficient for all cases. Asked for more information on how this new method handles spanning objects.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses memory migration issues in zsmalloc by handling single object charge migration and transferring lruvec and node statistics across affected nodes. It introduces a new approach to uncharge and re-charge compressed objects, simplifying the process for spanning objects that can span multiple pages.
